scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api -c blue,green "pnpm --filter web dev" "pnpm --filter api dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter web build && pnpm --filter api build
scripts.test: pnpm --filter web test && pnpm --filter api test
scripts.lint: prettier --check . && pnpm --filter web lint && pnpm --filter api lint
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter web typecheck && pnpm --filter api typecheck
scripts.migrate:prod: dotenv -e .env.prod -- pnpm exec prisma migrate deploy
